mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post_likes (like_id, community_post_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (seq_like_id.NEXTVAL, #{communityPostId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_post_likes WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post_likes WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post_likes WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} AND user_id = #{userId}
